title: VErsion Range Specifier (VERS) Type Definition
description: Schema to define the structure of a VErsion Range Specifier (VERS) type.

vers_component_definition.title: VERS component definition
vers_component_definition.description: VERS component definition properties that apply to most VERS components

permitted_characters.title: Permitted characters in this VERS component
permitted_characters.description: A regular expression (ECMA-262 dialect) defining the 'Permitted characters' for this component of this Package-URL type. If provided, this shall be a subset of the 'Permitted characters' defined in the PURL specification.

$schema.title: JSON schema
$schema.description: Contains the URL of the JSON schema for VERS type definition.

$id.title: VERS type definition id
$id.description: The unique identifier URI for this PURL type definition.

type.title: VERS type
type.description: The type string for this VERS type.

type_name.title: Type name
type_name.description: The name for this VERS type.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of this VERS type.

constraints_definition.title: Constraints definition
constraints_definition.description: VERS constraints as two-tuple array of (comparator, version string).

examples.title: VERS examples
examples.description: Example of valid, canonical VERS notations for this VERS type.

reference_urls.title: Reference URLs
reference_urls.description: Optional list of informational reference URLs about this VERS type.
